MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ARCHIBALED CUNNINGHAM, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - JUDGE MILLER RECUSES HERSELF FROM THE CASE. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS MARY WANG, MARIA SCHOPP's Notice Of Motion And Motion For Joinder In Defts Motion For Order Requiring Pltf To Furnish Security Pursuant To Ccp 391.1; - Per order of the Presiding Judge, the motion is continued to March 8, 2013, to be heard at 9:30 a.m. The parties are instructed to report to Department 206 on March 8 and the matter will be assigned to Judge Leslie Nichols for hearing. The plaintiff shall provide a courtesy copy of his opposition to department 206 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Marla J.
